description.en: Send broadcast messages on WhatsApp to thousands of opted-in contacts officially with rich media support, real-time read receipts, and zero ban risk.
description.pt: Envie mensagens de transmissão no WhatsApp para milhares de contatos oficiais com suporte de mídia rica, relatórios em tempo real e sem risco de banimento.

subtitle.en: Send templated messages to thousands of opted-in contacts with real-time delivery tracking, rich media support, and intelligent throttling — all via a single API call.

body.en: StartMessaging utilizes Meta's official Cloud API structure. By sending pre-approved templates (Utility, Marketing, or Authentication) to opted-in audiences, you bypass the spam filters that trigger number bans. Our intelligent system manages delivery rates dynamically to keep your sender score high.

bullets.en: Supports up to 100K+ contacts per broadcast
Rich media support: images, documents, interactive buttons
Real-time delivery confirmation and read receipts

heading.en: Broadcast vs. Campaigns vs. Unofficial Spam Blasting

subheading.en: Why choosing official broadcasts protects your brand reputation and phone number.

question.en: How many contacts can I send a broadcast to?

answer.en: There's no hard limit on our side. You can broadcast to 100,000+ contacts per campaign. Meta applies per-phone-number throughput limits (typically 80 messages/second for Tier 4 numbers). Our engine handles throttling automatically.

question.en: Do I need to use pre-approved templates for broadcasts?

answer.en: Yes. WhatsApp requires all business-initiated messages to use pre-approved templates. You can create templates through our dashboard. Most templates are reviewed and approved by Meta within minutes.

question.en: Is broadcasting on WhatsApp compliant with local anti-spam regulations?
question.in: Do I need TRAI DLT registration to send WhatsApp broadcasts in India?
question.br: Como funciona a conformidade com a LGPD nos disparos de transmissão no Brasil?
question.id: Apakah WhatsApp Blast Resmi ini mematuhi regulasi anti-spam Kominfo?

answer.en: Yes, official broadcasts are fully compliant because they require recipient opt-in and utilize pre-approved templates.
answer.in: No, WhatsApp Business API broadcasts do not require TRAI DLT registration. DLT registration is only required for carrier SMS fallback messages. This makes WhatsApp broadcasts much easier to set up and manage.
answer.br: Sim, os disparos de transmissão oficiais via API da StartMessaging estão em total conformidade com a LGPD, desde que você obtenha e armazene o consentimento (opt-in) explícito do usuário final.
answer.id: Ya, WhatsApp Blast resmi menggunakan API Cloud resmi dari Meta. Hal ini mematuhi regulasi Kominfo karena mensyaratkan persetujuan (opt-in) pelanggan, berbeda dengan skrip spammer tidak resmi yang melanggar hukum.

subtext.en: Free plan includes 1,000 messages. No credit card required.
